ideation: This sequence aims to depict a boy playfully adjusting his hair or perhaps looking thoughtfully off into the distance.  It will involve a gentle movement of one arm, while the other remains relatively still to maintain balance. The movement will be smooth and not overly exaggerated, reflecting the calm demeanor often associated with the emoji. The first frame shows both arms hanging naturally at the sides. In the second frame, the right arm rises slightly, with the hand moving towards the head as if to touch the hair. In the third frame, the right arm moves slightly further, the hand almost reaching the head. Frame four shows the arm pulling away from the head and returning to the side. In the final frame, both arms return to their initial relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm begins to lift, hand moving up
hand nears the head, a gentle adjustment
arm lowers, pulling away from the head
both arms return to a resting pose
